name: Grom Vulgarn
sd_appearance: Taller than most humans, heavily muscled half-orc with greenish skin tone, tusks, and a crooked nose, Grom Vulgarn stands clad in silver and white armor with blue accents, arena medals adorning his chest. He wears polished scale mail or plate, armed with a longsword and a shield emblazoned with the Argent Blades emblem. Dark sunglasses hide his eyes, while a pair of brass knuckles, a silent reminder of his readiness, dangle from his belt. One distinctive visual detail: Grom's tusks glint like sharpened ivory in the dim light, a testament to his fierce determination.
faction_visual: silver and white armour with blue accents, arena medals, theatrical presence
style_note: theatrical glory-hunter — everything designed to be seen from the stands
